title: Garlic Flaky Greek Lamb Grill
description: A garlicky, flaky lamb grilled to perfection, topped with a silky coconut cream sauce for a Greek-inspired adventure.
instructions: In a bowl combine minced garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, mint, rosemary, salt, and pepper; whisk into a smooth marinade.
Add lamb chops to the bowl, toss to coat thoroughly, then cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to 2 hours to allow flavors to penetrate.
Preheat the grill to medium-high (450°F). Lightly oil the grill grates to prevent sticking.
Remove lamb from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for about 10 minutes before grilling.
Grill lamb chops for 3-4 minutes per side for medium-rare, or until an instant-read thermometer reads 145°F (63°C).
While the lamb rests, gently warm the coconut cream in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring until silky; do not let it boil.
Plate the grilled lamb chops and drizzle with the warmed coconut cream. Sprinkle chopped dill on top if desired.
Serve immediately with warm Greek pita or a fresh side salad. Enjoy!
